title: M0 - Foundation
description: Project setup, tooling, and scaffolding. After this milestone the repo is clean, the database is connected, and the development workflow is in place.

title: M1 - Core Feature
description: The primary feature that makes the product useful. Users can complete the main workflow end-to-end.

title: M2 - Polish & Deploy
description: Error handling, tests, performance, and production deployment. The product is ready for real users.
